prompt: As my lifts get stronger, my rest periods keep getting longer. What causes that, and what does the literature say about rest intervals for hypertrophy vs strength?
assertions: Explains that heavier loads increase fatigue per set, so stronger lifters naturally need longer recovery
States hypertrophy research findings are mixed (some favor longer, some shorter, some no difference)
For strength, leans toward longer rests especially for strong lifters on compounds
Provides concrete rest period guidelines (roughly 90s-2min for upper/isolation, ~3min commonly, ~5min+ for heavy compounds)
Mentions supersets as a time-saving strategy that doesn't sacrifice key lift performance
